author: @Barskor1
text:
This brought to mind a interesting paper on electroplating nano plastic spheres with chrome and then dissolving them so nickel can fill the spaces left behind creating a wood like structure that is extremely light 1/5 the normal weight and 5x stronger than steel.
It would make for wonderful structural material for electric cars planes and such. 
A light and strong material like this might make a vacuum sphere airship possible! Sounds crazy but it would work by displacing the atmosphere as a boat does water.

author: @colleenforrest7936
text:
This looks like fun! 
I've made the wands before, but have never done copper plating.  

It might be interesting to add a few layers from the battery making kit and turn the wand handle into a battery, and cover it in Plastidip. Then paint a line of conductive ink on the wand shaft so that when you touch the hidden wires of a led light or a small motor, they start working. :)

Bwahahaha!
Science is cool

replies.author: @rawandrealserendipity
replies.text: A fabulous idea. Do send photos if you do it ☺
